'''zakuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantioselectivity|enantioselectivity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantioselectivity|enantioselectivity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zakuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zækijith|zækijith]] || [[word:zækijij|zækijij]] || [[word:zækijish|zækijish]] || [[word:zækiji|zækiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakukujuth|zakukujuth]] || [[word:zakukujuj|zakukujuj]] || [[word:zakukujush|zakukujush]] || [[word:zakukuju|zakukuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakujuth|zakujuth]] || [[word:zakujuj|zakujuj]] || [[word:zakujush|zakujush]] || [[word:zakuju|zakuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakufjuth|zakufjuth]] || [[word:zakufjuj|zakufjuj]] || [[word:zakufjush|zakufjush]] || [[word:zakufjuf|zakufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zakujuthu|zakujuthu]] || [[word:zakujuju|zakujuju]] || [[word:zakujushu|zakujushu]] || [[word:zakujuku|zakujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zakujuth|zakujuth]] || [[word:zakujuj|zakujuj]] || [[word:zakujush|zakujush]] || [[word:zakuju|zakuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zakujuthul|zakujuthul]] || [[word:zakujujul|zakujujul]] || [[word:zakujushul|zakujushul]] || [[word:zakujukul|zakujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zakujuthuthu|zakujuthuthu]] || [[word:zakujujuju|zakujujuju]] || [[word:zakujushushu|zakujushushu]] || [[word:zakujuku|zakujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zakujuthun|zakujuthun]] || [[word:zakujujun|zakujujun]] || [[word:zakujushun|zakujushun]] || [[word:zakujukun|zakujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zakujuthuoro|zakujuthuoro]] || [[word:zakujujuoro|zakujujuoro]] || [[word:zakujushuoro|zakujushuoro]] || [[word:zakujukuoro|zakujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
